mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT T1.ID AS COURSE_ID , T2.WEEK , T3.ID AS NOTICE_ID , T3.TITLE , CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NOTICE_LOG T4 WHERE T4.NOTICE_ID = T3.ID AND T4.USER_ID = #{userId} ) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS READ_STATUS FROM COURSES T1 INNER JOIN LECTURES T2 ON T1.ID = T2.COURSE_ID INNER JOIN NOTICES T3 ON T1.ID = T2.COURSE_ID WHERE T1.ID = #{courseId} AND T2.WEEK = #{week} AND T3.INS_DT BETWEEN T2.START_DT AND T2.END_DT ORDER BY READ_STATUS ASC, T3.ID ASC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ID) FROM COURSES T1 INNER JOIN LECTURES T2 ON T1.ID = T2.COURSE_ID INNER JOIN NOTICES T3 ON T3.INS_DT BETWEEN T2.START_DT AND T2.END_DT WHERE T1.ID = #{courseId}
AND T3.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%')
AND T3.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%')
AND T3.INS_ID LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%')
AND (T3.TITLE LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%') OR T3.CONTENT LIKE CONCAT('%', #{req.keyword}, '%'))
